Short CV

I am Ozlem SIMSEK,

My primary specialization fields are chemistry and forensic science. I studied my university degree at Istanbul University which is one of the most respected and well-known university in Turkey. After getting a Bachelor degree I started to study my Master's degree in the field of Forensic Sciences at Istanbul University (ink dating) and Ondokuz Mayıs University (tobacco analysis). I got my Master's degrees in 2017 and 2019, respectively.

I am still studying my doctoral studies in the field of Forensic Sciences at Üsküdar University.
